name: ON
description: ONLIVE is a decentralized digital infrastructure project built on the Polygon blockchain. Its core objective is to provide a blockchain-based platform for interactive media, virtual experiences, and real-value digital services. The ecosystem is centered around the ON token, which functions as the primary utility asset for accessing services, content, and premium features within the platform. ONLIVE is designed to operate across both web and mobile applications, enabling users to interact without traditional accounts, relying instead on wallet-based access. The project focuses on transparent, automated processes through smart contracts, ensuring that access control, payments, and value distribution are executed in a decentralized and verifiable manner.
